offer: For property managers overseeing 5–15 rental units, inconsistent scheduling causes tenant dissatisfaction. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent scheduling of equipment inspections leads to delayed repairs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share insights in property management forums
try_it: Let users manually schedule inspections and alerts for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Offer onboarding for first 10 early-access users
